Item.Name: TIME
Item.Desc: Time of day, yyyymmddhhmmsscc (yymmddhhmmss pre E5-0698)

Item.Name: TIME
Item.Desc: Time of day, yyyymmddhhmmsscc (yymmddhhmmss pre E5-0698

Trans.Name: S2F35
Trans.Desc: Link event report (unlink - CEID not exist)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (Disable All)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (Disable S5 & S9)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (Disable invalid S)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid S1)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid secondary msg)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid S&F)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid S)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid format)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid format)

Trans.Name: S2F43
Trans.Desc: Reset spooling steams and functions (invalid format)

Item.Desc: Acknowledgement code for variable limit attribute set

Trans.Desc: Define variable limits attributes (delete all limit)

Item.Desc: Acknowledgement code for variable limit attribute set

Trans.Desc: Define variable limits attributes (delete VID limit)

Item.Name: ERRW7
Item.Desc: Text describing an error in the process program

Trans.Desc: Terminal display, multi-block (too many lines, n>8)
